name: Apache Pulsar Monitor
description: Monitor an Apache Pulsar topic for new messages and trigger jobs when messages are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new messages are detected on the Pulsar topic

outputs.description: Passes message information (topic, message_id, data, publish_timestamp_ms, partition_key, properties) to triggered jobs via run_config

subscription_name.label: Subscription Name
subscription_name.description: Durable subscription name. Pulsar tracks the position per subscription.

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are detected

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to consume per evaluation

receive_timeout_ms.label: Receive Timeout (ms)
receive_timeout_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait for each message before stopping the poll

jwt_token_env_var.label: JWT Token Env Var
jwt_token_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing a JWT auth token

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
